title: Complex Organic Farming
hook: Balance companion crops, moisture, compost, beneficial insects, and pest pressure across a living organic farm grid.
mechanic: Canvas farming strategy loop. The player taps action cards and plots to plant tomatoes, beans, and marigolds, then spends scarce water, compost, bugs, and moves to shape soil life, crop health, pest spread, and harvest targets across escalating seasons.

dedupe.notes: Tim explicitly assigned this Treasure Vault idea and folder ownership; no catalog selection was performed in this scoped build.
